message:
test(evidence): add merge-related variants to EvidenceEventType serde roundtrip test

Add MergeProofChecked, MergeApplied, MergeRejected, PolicySwitched,
and ContentionSample to the exhaustive serde roundtrip test ensuring
all EvidenceEventType variants survive serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
